recommendations: Investigate 946 verified skills with null verified_commit

entries.triggered_by: PM authorization — uncapped scanner_penalty bug fix

summary.method: Custom corrective script (batch_reassess.py cannot handle because scorer.overall_score was already post-penalty crushed). Reconstructed base from formula: 100 - 10*M - 5*U - 15*B, then applied capped penalty (min(40, raw)).
summary.bug_description: Old pipeline had no cap on scanner_penalty. Large codebases with many low/medium findings scored 0 despite no injection or obfuscation.

findings.note: Retroactive summary log of all PM override decisions from 2026-03-03 sessions. Individual override rationale stored in each skill file pm_override field (dict format).
findings.outcome: All 66 fails cleared (64→pass, 1→MR, 1 duplicate deleted). All 110 MR cleared (98→pass, 12→unverified for re-run). Collection: 0 fail, 7 MR, 553+ pass.
